markets.question: New Rihanna Album before GTA VI?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Rihanna officially releases a new album before Grand Theft Auto VI is officially released in the US. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

If neither occurs by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to 50-50.

For the purposes of this market, "release" refers to the game becoming publicly available for purchase or download in the US. Early access, beta versions, other forms of pre-release availability, or leaks will not count as an official release. If the release is only for certain consoles (e.g. Xbox Series X/S) it will count.

The resolution source for the release of GTA VI is official information from Rockstar Games or its parent company, Take-Two Interactive.

Officially released means that a newly released album is officially available for download or streaming (not including live events) by the resolution date.

Re-releases, deluxe editions, compilations, or greatest hits albums will not count, unless they contain at least 50% tracks that have never been officially released in any format prior to the album's release.

The resolution source for the album release will be any official streaming or download site, e.g. Apple Music or Spotify.

events.title: What will happen before GTA VI?
events.description: This is a market on predicting events that will occur before the release of Grand Theft Auto VI.

eventMetadata.context_description: Rockstar's confirmation of GTA VI's November 19, 2026 launch—following two delays from an initial 2025 target—has fixed a clear timeline that shapes trader focus on intervening events. Take-Two's recent earnings tied record fiscal projections directly to this date, signaling no further slips and intensifying scrutiny of cultural milestones like new albums from Playboi Carti or Rihanna, AI advancements such as GPT-6, or geopolitical shifts including a Russia-Ukraine ceasefire. GTA Online's summer 2026 update and potential marketing pushes add promotional layers, while the game's massive cultural weight means even modest chart or tech breakthroughs carry outsized market impact ahead of the console-exclusive debut.

markets.question: Will Harvey Weinstein be sentenced to no prison time?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the prison sentence, if any, imposed on Harvey Weinstein as part of his ongoing New York retrial (People of the State of New York v. Harvey Weinstein) by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET.

This market will resolve immediately based on the first sentence rendered in this case, regardless of any appeals. If Weinstein is found not guilty, there is a mistrial, or if the first sentencing does not include any jail or prison time, this market will resolve to "No Prison Time."

If no sentencing takes place by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will also resolve to "No Prison Time."

If the sentence falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

For the purposes of this market, it does not matter whether the sentence is concurrent or consecutive to any existing sentence Weinstein is already serving. The market will resolve based on the total prison sentence imposed in this case.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the New York court system or other involved U.S. government sources; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

markets.question: Will the Carolina Hurricanes win the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the Carolina Hurricanes win the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

This market will resolve to “No” if it becomes impossible for this team to win the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup based off the rules of the NHL.

The resolution source for this market will be information from the NHL.

events.title: 2026 NHL Stanley Cup Champion
events.description: This market is to predict the winner of the 2025–26 NHL Stanley Cup championship.

eventMetadata.context_description: The Carolina Hurricanes hold an 79.5% implied probability in the 2026 Stanley Cup futures market due to their commanding 3-2 series lead in the Final against the Vegas Golden Knights, bolstered by a dominant regular-season performance that included 113 points and the Metropolitan Division title. Recent momentum has shifted decisively toward Carolina after consecutive victories, including a 5-3 Game 4 win and a 4-2 Game 5 triumph, extending their streak without back-to-back losses since January. Key contributions from players like Jordan Staal and strong goaltending have capitalized on home-ice advantage and superior regular-season form. Vegas, at 20%, remains alive with home games pending but trails after early series leads evaporated amid Carolina's improved penalty kill and offensive depth in the Eastern Conference playoffs.

events.title: 2026 NBA Champion
events.description: This market is to predict the winner of the 2025–26 NBA Finals.

eventMetadata.context_description: The 2026 NBA Finals matchup between the New York Knicks and San Antonio Spurs has produced a sharp shift in implied probabilities, with the Knicks holding an 80% consensus share after taking a 3-1 series lead. New York’s record 29-point comeback victory in Game 4 at Madison Square Garden exposed defensive lapses and poor execution by San Antonio, which squandered a commanding advantage. Jalen Brunson’s consistent playoff scoring and the Knicks’ extended winning streak have reinforced trader confidence in their ability to close out the series at home or on the road. The Spurs, despite Victor Wembanyama’s impact and a strong regular-season record, now face elimination scenarios that require three straight wins, a historically rare feat in Finals play. These late-series developments have driven the current pricing differential.

These late-series developments have driven the current pricing differential.

eventMetadata.context_description: Xi Jinping maintains firm control over the Chinese Communist Party, state institutions, and military as of mid-2026, with analysts widely expecting him to secure a fourth term as general secretary at the 21st Party Congress in autumn 2027. Recent military purges, including the early 2026 investigation of senior generals such as Zhang Youxia, have further centralized authority under loyalists rather than signaling internal challenges. Xi has remained active in high-profile diplomacy, including summits with foreign leaders and a June 2026 state visit to North Korea, while overseeing preparations for the 15th Five-Year Plan. Term limits on the presidency were eliminated in 2018, and no designated successor has emerged to contest his position. These factors underpin the trader consensus reflected in the 92.2% implied probability that he will not leave office before 2027.
